description_long: This is a modern, single-story house featuring a flat roof and expansive floor-to-ceiling windows along one side, allowing for abundant natural light. The structure includes a spacious open-plan living area, visible interior furnishings, and a minimalist design aesthetic. Adjacent to the main building is a large rectangular swimming pool with metal handrails, and a shaded outdoor dining area with umbrellas and wooden furniture. The exterior is predominantly white with clean lines and a geometric layout, complemented by a small entryway with a tiled path. The house is surrounded by open space, making it suitable for urban or suburban settings. The overall design emphasizes openness, outdoor living, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a swimming pool, and an outdoor dining area. The design is minimalist and open, with white exterior walls and clean lines.
description_view_0: This view highlights the open-plan living area, large glass windows, and the adjacent outdoor dining space with umbrellas and the swimming pool to the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the swimming pool is prominent in the foreground, with the outdoor dining area and the main entryway visible behind it.
description_view_2: This side view shows the length of the house, the pool on the left, and the open living space with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the main entryway with a tiled path, a smaller window, and the back of the house, with the large windows and pool less visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryway with a single door, tiled path, and minimal decorative elements
